caption: A person with blond hair wearing a black shirt and white headphones is visible in a small picture-in-picture window in the lower left of the screen, appearing in a room with a Christmas tree. The main screen displays a video game interface titled "HARVEST PRESENT." In the first frame, a red "UT" logo is centered over a background of autumn leaves. As the sequence progresses, the screen transitions to a red and pink background featuring a digital athlete card. The card shows a football player in a red uniform with the number "76," identified as "TEVEN JENKINS," with a rating of "90" and the designation "RG." On-screen text across the bottom provides navigation options: "MARK/UNMARK," "DISMISS ALL," and "BACK." The person in the small window reacts with an open-mouthed expression of surprise as the player card is revealed.
